task: Implement ENGUI-151 unified create draft store v2 and storage adapters, then continue sequentially through follow-up tickets
notes: Work sequentially ticket-by-ticket. Do not touch prisma/db. Current untracked path prisma/db/ must remain untouched.

task: Add desktop Image Create prompt draft selector with prompt locking and re-render-on-generate behavior
notes: Approved by user via chat-specific confirm:yes fallback. Scope: add Prompt Constructor draft selector in desktop Image Create, disable prompt field when selected, re-render prompt on each generate, preserve random character refresh behavior, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Implemented desktop Prompt Constructor draft selector in Image Create, added rerender-on-generate flow with scene snapshot persistence, added regression tests, passed vitest and production build, restarted engui-studio.service, verified HTTP 200.

task: Add mobile Image Create Prompt Constructor draft selector tile with prompt section hiding
notes: Approved in chat-specific confirm:yes fallback. Scope: add mobile tile in create panel, picker for saved Prompt Constructor drafts, show selected draft title, hide prompt area and prompt-related buttons when selected, then test/build/restart/commit/push.
result: Implemented the mobile Prompt Constructor draft tile and picker, hid manual prompt controls while a draft is selected, re-synced the selected draft on every Generate, added regression tests, passed targeted vitest coverage, completed production build, restarted engui-studio.service, and verified local HTTP 200 on port 3010.

task: Label Local action in Prompt Constructor character render
notes: Approved in chat-specific confirm:yes fallback. Scope: add explicit `Local action:` label in Prompt Constructor render output, add regression coverage, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Added labeled `Local action:` rendering for sceneTemplateV2 character output, updated regression test coverage, passed targeted vitest, completed production build, restarted engui-studio.service, and verified HTTP 200 for /prompt-constructor on port 3010.

task: Reorder Local action before Pose in Prompt Constructor character render
notes: Approved in chat-specific confirm:yes fallback. Scope: move `Local action:` above `Pose:` in sceneTemplateV2 render, update regression coverage, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Reordered sceneTemplateV2 character output so `Local action:` now appears before `Pose:`, updated regression test coverage, passed targeted vitest, completed production build, restarted engui-studio.service, and verified HTTP 200 for /prompt-constructor on port 3010.

task: Move appearance lower in Prompt Constructor character render
notes: Approved by direct command. Scope: move appearance after props in sceneTemplateV2 render, update regression coverage, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Moved appearance lower in sceneTemplateV2 character output so it now renders after outfit, local action, pose, and props; updated regression coverage, passed targeted vitest, completed production build, restarted engui-studio.service, and verified HTTP 200 for /prompt-constructor on port 3010.

task: Use actual character names instead of generic Character N in Prompt Constructor render
notes: Approved in chat-specific confirm:yes fallback. Scope: replace sceneTemplateV2 numbered character headers with actual rendered names when available, reuse the same references in relation lines, update regression tests, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: sceneTemplateV2 now renders actual character names as headers and relation references, with fallback to role or numbered label when needed; updated regression coverage, passed targeted vitest, completed production build, restarted engui-studio.service, and verified HTTP 200 for /prompt-constructor on port 3010.

task: Keep Character N headers in character sections and replace Character N with names only outside those sections
notes: User correction after ENGUI-212. Scope: restore original Character N character-block headers, replace Character N references with corresponding names only in non-character sections, update regression tests, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Restored Character N headers in sceneTemplateV2 character blocks, replaced Character N with resolved character names only in non-character sections, updated regression coverage, passed targeted vitest, completed production build, restarted engui-studio.service, and verified HTTP 200 for /prompt-constructor on port 3010.

task: Exclude gender from Character Manager appearance render inside Prompt Constructor
notes: Direct user command. Scope: remove male/female from Character Manager appearance text used by Prompt Constructor direct picks and random character appearance, update regression tests, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Character Manager appearance text used by Prompt Constructor now excludes gender for direct character picks and random character appearance, while keeping other scene assembly behavior intact; updated regression coverage, passed targeted vitest, completed production build, restarted engui-studio.service, and verified HTTP 200 for /prompt-constructor on port 3010.

task: Delete a local job if cancel is requested after the upstream server already lost it
notes: Direct user command. Scope: when cancel hits missing upstream job, delete it locally instead of marking cancelled; update desktop and mobile flows plus regression tests, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Missing-upstream cancel now deletes the local job instead of marking it cancelled; desktop and mobile cancel flows treat this as a successful delete, route regression coverage was added, targeted vitest passed, production build succeeded, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for / and /m/jobs.

task: Keep fullscreen gallery viewer paging through the full gallery instead of stopping at the loaded batch
notes: Approved via Telegram confirm button. Scope: preload adjacent gallery pages while swiping in fullscreen viewer so mobile and desktop gallery continue past the initial loaded batch, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Fullscreen gallery viewer now preloads adjacent pages while open, so mobile and desktop gallery swiping continues past the initially loaded batch; production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for /m/gallery and /.

task: Show a per-image loading indicator in mobile fullscreen gallery viewer
notes: Direct user command. Scope: show a small top-left spinner only for the current mobile fullscreen gallery image while it is loading, and restart that indicator when the user swipes to another image, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Added a mobile-only top-left loading spinner in the shared fullscreen gallery viewer, tied to the current image load lifecycle so it resets on every swipe to a different image. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for /m/gallery and /.

task: Add Upscale button to desktop and mobile job details
notes: Direct user command after surface clarification. Scope: add Upscale action to desktop and mobile job details screens, matching job-list behavior for image/video jobs, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Added Upscale actions to desktop and mobile job details for image/video jobs, wired to the same /api/upscale flow used by list actions with matching success/error toasts. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for /m/jobs and /.

task: Move mobile gallery image loading spinner to the center
notes: Direct user command. Scope: move the mobile fullscreen gallery image loading spinner from top-left to center so it no longer clashes with the info button, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Moved the mobile fullscreen gallery image loading spinner into the center overlay so it no longer conflicts with the info button, while keeping the per-image reset behavior on swipe. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for /m/gallery and /.

task: Add Upscale action to gallery details
notes: Direct user command. Scope: add Upscale to mobile gallery details and desktop gallery asset dialog, using the galleryAssetId upscale flow, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Added Upscale actions to both mobile gallery details and the desktop GalleryAssetDialog, wired to the galleryAssetId-based /api/upscale flow for image/video assets. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for /m/gallery and /.

task: Move mobile gallery loading spinner to the top center line
notes: Direct user correction. Scope: place the mobile fullscreen gallery loading spinner in the top center on the same line as info/close, not in the image center, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Moved the mobile fullscreen gallery loading spinner into the top-center overlay line between the left and right header controls, while preserving per-image reset behavior on swipe. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for /m/gallery and /.

task: Auto-add completed upscale jobs to gallery bucket upscale
notes: Direct user command. Scope: move upscale autosave from lazy job-details read path into the real completion path so completed upscale jobs immediately create gallery assets in bucket `upscale`, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Moved upscale autosave into the RunPod completion path by extracting a shared helper and invoking it immediately after job completion persistence. Completed upscale image/video jobs now create gallery assets in bucket `upscale` without waiting for job-details reads, and queued gallery derivative/enrichment jobs as part of autosave. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for / and /m/gallery.

task: Fix regression where completed jobs fail after artifact finalization
notes: Urgent direct user report. Scope: repair RunPod completion path so normal jobs no longer fail after successful artifact finalization, make upscale gallery autosave best-effort and non-fatal, then build/restart/commit/push.
result: Fixed the completion regression by returning the updated row from persistJobUpdate and making upscale gallery autosave best-effort with try/catch logging, so a gallery autosave problem can no longer flip a successfully finalized job into failed. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for / and /m/jobs.

task: Repair failed jobs that actually completed during the autosave regression window
notes: Direct user command. Scope: detect jobs flipped to failed by the autosave regression using the exact undefined workspaceId error plus existing result artifacts, restore them to completed, then verify and commit/push.
result: Repaired 6 jobs that were falsely marked failed by the autosave regression by selecting only rows with the exact undefined workspaceId error and an existing result artifact, then restoring them to status `completed` and clearing the error. Verified the repaired jobs retained valid local artifacts.

task: Refactor upscale submit order and clean S3 inputs on RunPod submit failure
notes: Direct user command. Scope: change upscale flow to prepare input and submit to RunPod before creating the local job, and best-effort clean uploaded S3 input artifacts when submitJob fails; then build/restart/commit/push. GitHub issues are disabled on the repo, so no issue could be created.
result: Refactored the upscale route so it prepares and uploads secure input, submits to RunPod, and only then creates the local queued job with runpodJobId already attached. Added best-effort cleanup of uploaded S3 input artifacts when submitJob fails, logging cleanup warnings without masking the submit failure. Production build passed, engui-studio.service restarted, and HTTP 200 was verified for / and /m/jobs.
